testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 01. HOME PAGE LOAD & UI ELEMENTS VERIFICATION
testcase.system-out:
█ STEP: Loading Amazon home page
█ → INFO: Navigation Response: 200 → ASSERT: Current URL: https://www.amazon.com/
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Home page URL verified → ASSERT: Page Title: Amazon.com
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Page title verified
█ STEP: Verifying navigation UI elements
█ ⚠ WARNING: Search Box not found - locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: [2m - waiting for locator('input[placeholder*="Search"]').first() to be visible[22m
█ ⚠ WARNING: Amazon Logo not found - locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: [2m - waiting for locator('a[href*="nav_logo"]').first() to be visible[22m
█ ⚠ WARNING: Today's Deals not found - locator.waitFor: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: [2m - waiting for locator('span:has-text("Today\'s Deals")').first() to be visible[22m
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Best Sellers is visible and enabled
█ ✓ SUCCESS: ✓ Home page load and UI elements verified

testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 02. SEARCH FOR PRODUCT & VERIFY RESULTS
testcase.system-out:
█ STEP: Searching for: "PlayStation 5 Console"
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Amazon home page loaded
█ → INFO: Search box found and visible → ASSERT: Entered search term: "PlayStation 5 Console"
█ → INFO: Search submitted → ASSERT: Search results URL: https://www.amazon.com/s?k=PlayStation+5+Console&ref=nb_sb_noss
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Search results page loaded → ASSERT: Found 16 search results
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Search results verified - 16 items found
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Relevant search results confirmed

testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 03. NAVIGATE TO PRODUCT & ADD TO CART
testcase.system-out:
█ STEP: Searching for product: "Laptop"
█ ✓ SUCCESS: Search completed
█ ✗ ERROR: Product and cart test failed: locator.textContent: Target page, context or browser has been closed Call log: [2m - waiting for locator('[data-component-type="s-search-result"]').first().locator('h2 a')[22m
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-bc410-GATE-TO-PRODUCT-ADD-TO-CART\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-bc410-GATE-TO-PRODUCT-ADD-TO-CART\error-context.md]]
[[ATTACHMENT|amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-bc410-GATE-TO-PRODUCT-ADD-TO-CART\trace.zip]]

error.message: locator.textContent: Target page, context or browser has been closed

testcase.error:
amazon-advanced.test.js:164:3 › Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 03. NAVIGATE TO PRODUCT & ADD TO CART
Error: locator.textContent: Target page, context or browser has been closed Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-component-type="s-search-result"]').first().locator('h2 a')
180 | 181 | // Get product title before clicking > 182 | const productTitle = await firstProduct.locator('h2 a').textContent(); | ^ 183 | log.assert(`First product title: ${productTitle?.trim().substring(0, 80)}...`); 184 | 185 | // Click on product at C:\Playwright Automation\Amazon\amazon-playwright-test\src\tests\amazon-advanced.test.js:182:63
attachment #1: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\amazon-advanced-Amazon-com-bc410-GATE-TO-PRODUCT-ADD-TO-CART\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 04. NAVIGATE TO SHOPPING CART
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 05. VERIFY NAVIGATION MENU & CATEGORIES
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 06. URL NAVIGATION VERIFICATION
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 07. SEARCH WITH FILTERS & VERIFICATION
Amazon.com Advanced E2E Tests › 08. PRODUCT AVAILABILITY & STOCK STATUS
